summary: In undervalued --scope collection, do not fall back to the store key as a release id when basic_information.id is missing.
reason: Collection resource rows are keyed by instance_id (see discogs_sync.go), not release id. The prior fallback parsed that instance_id and used it as a release id, so a collection row missing basic_information.id would fetch marketplace stats and read/write price snapshots under the wrong release. The fallback is only valid for wantlist scope, whose rows are keyed by release id; for collection scope the row is now skipped.
validated_outcome: go build ./... clean; dogfood --live --level full still 193/193; undervalued --scope collection no longer keys snapshots by instance_id.
